name: What if ChatGPT gave wrong case law—can lawyer be disbarred?

mainEntity.name: What if ChatGPT gave wrong case law—can lawyer be disbarred?

acceptedAnswer.description: Possible for repeated negligence. Context: Bars sanction AI misuse; e.g., fake briefs led to suspensions. Key factors: Pattern of errors, client harm. Practical guidance: File complaint with state bar, provide evidence. Rare but increasing.
